segments.text: So getup attack's the only option
segments.original_text: そうすると攻撃上がりしかない可能性がありますね

segments.text: And side B on the landing
But getup attack has massive risk if shielded
segments.original_text: 攻撃上がりはねガードされた時のリスクが甚大ですから

segments.text: So he can't keep using that option
segments.original_text: そう何度も取れる択ではないでしょうから

segments.text: Side B this time takes it to the KO!
segments.original_text: 横B今度こそ撃墜まで行きます

full_text: So getup attack's the only option And side B on the landing But getup attack has massive risk if shielded So he can't keep using that option Side B this time takes it to the KO!
